headline: Omnicom: Buy This 15% Earnings Yield With A Dividend Kicker
summary: Omnicom is upgraded to 'Strong Buy' due to deep value, robust income, and significant shareholder returns at a discounted 6.7x forward P/E. Learn more about OMC stock here.
